name: Chicken Teriyaki and Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 medium potatoes, cut into thin wedges
1 pound boned and skinned chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave potatoes for 8-10 minutes until tender.
2. While the potatoes are cooking, heat a large skillet over high heat. Add the chicken and cook, turning occasionally, until browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the potatoes to the skillet and sauté, tossing until lightly browned.
4. Stir in the onions and Teriyaki sauce, then continue to cook until heated through.
